title: Maneater
why_this_song: Maneater by Hall & Oates (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 24 times; first heard in: "(Oh-oh, here she comes)"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "Ooh, she's sitting with you but her eyes are on the door"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "Watch out, boy, she'll chew you up"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "She's a maneater"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "She'll only come out at night"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "comes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "comes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "she's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "she's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She'll only come out at night
I know what she can do

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Watch out, boy, she'll chew you up
(Oh-oh, here she comes) here she comes

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Maneater" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Maneater" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
